title: FTS database disk image is malformed for update on languageid
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE vt1 (c0 VARCHAR(255), languageid VARCHAR(255), title VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO vt1 (c0, languageid, title) VALUES ('First entry', 'en', 'First Title'), ('Second entry', 'fr', 'Second Title');
UPDATE vt1 SET languageid = NULL WHERE c0 = 'First entry';
INSERT INTO vt1 (c0, languageid, title) VALUES ('integrity-check', NULL, NULL);
key_bug_features: UPDATE on languageid causes database disk image corruption
